questionText: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT p_ProductName."Product", p_Category."Category", p_Subcategory."Subcategory", s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" AS revenue, s_OrderQuantity."Sales Order Line" AS units_sold, (s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") AS gross_profit, ROUND((s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") / s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" * 100, 2) AS margin_pct, p_ProductName."Product", p_Category."Category", p_Subcategory."Subcategory", s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" AS revenue, s_OrderQuantity."Sales Order Line" AS units_sold, (s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") AS gross_profit, ROUND((s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" - p_Product."Product Standard Cost") / s_SalesAmount."Sales Amount" * 100, 2) AS margin_pct FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales ON SalesSalesTerritoryKey."SalesTerritoryKey" = SalesSalesTerritoryKey."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."ProductKey" = ProductKey."ProductKey" JOIN Sales ON SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" = SalesOrderLineKey."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON CustomerKey."Postal Code" = CustomerKey."Postal Code" JOIN Date ON DateKey."Postal Code" = DateKey."Postal Code" JOIN Reseller ON ResellerKey."Postal Code" = ResellerKey."Postal Code" JOIN Sales ON SalesOrderLineKey."Postal Code" = SalesOrderLineKey."Postal Code" JOIN Product ON ProductKey."Postal Code" = ProductKey."Postal Code" WHERE SalesAmount."Sales Amount" > 0 ORDER BY SalesAmount."Sales Amount" DESC LIMIT 10

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.

Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT ST."Country" AS Country, ST."Region" AS Region FROM Sales_Territory JOIN Sales_Territory ON ST."Region" = ST."Region" WHERE ST."Region" = ST."Region" ORDER BY ST."Region" ASC

root ::= ctequery

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT ONST."Group", D."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year", ST."Channel" AS "top_channel", ST."Channel" AS "channel_revenue", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS "group_year_revenue", CASTROUNDIFNULLSUMSST."Sales Amount" / SUM(S."Sales Amount") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct" FROM Sales_Territory GROUP BY ST."Group", ST."Region", ST."Country", ST."Group", ST."Region",
